payload.name: scenario1_short_missing_rid_no_direct_event
payload.note: 场景1：无 RID 短时进入，不应直接事件化。

payload.name: scenario2_sustained_missing_rid_risk_upgrade
payload.note: 场景2：持续无身份停留，风险应逐步升级。

payload.name: scenario3_legal_target_keep_low_risk
payload.note: 场景3：合法目标进入，应保持低风险且不触发抓拍事件。

payload.name: scenario4_suspicious_rid_fast_risk_upgrade
payload.note: 场景4：身份异常目标进入，应快速升风险。

payload.name: scenario5_high_risk_visual_capture_ready
payload.note: 场景5：高风险目标出现后，应触发视觉锁定或抓拍预备。

payload.name: scenario6_track_lost_smooth_recover
payload.reason: event_active expected 0 but got 1; current_event_state expected CLOSED but got OPEN; current_event_close_reason expected TRACK_LOST but got NONE; main_state expected one of ['IDLE', 'LOST'] but got HIGH_RISK; risk_level expected one of ['NONE', 'NORMAL'] but got HIGH_RISK
payload.note: 场景6：目标丢失后，状态应平稳回落且不挂死。

failed_checks.name: scenario6_track_lost_smooth_recover
failed_checks.reason: event_active expected 0 but got 1; current_event_state expected CLOSED but got OPEN; current_event_close_reason expected TRACK_LOST but got NONE; main_state expected one of ['IDLE', 'LOST'] but got HIGH_RISK; risk_level expected one of ['NONE', 'NORMAL'] but got HIGH_RISK
